widgets_values: Увеличьте shift, если вы получаете слишком много размытых / темных / плохих изображений. Уменьшите, если вы хотите увеличить детализацию.

nodes.title: KSampler settings
widgets_values:
Вы можете протестировать и выбрать оптимальную настройку самостоятельно. Следующая таблица предназначена для справки.

| model            | steps | cfg |
|---------------------|---------------|---------------|
| fp8_e4m3fn（Qwen team's suggestion）             | 40                | 2.5               
| fp8_e4m3fn             | 20                | 2.5               |
| fp8_e4m3fn + 8steps LoRA    | 8               | 2.5               |
| fp8_e4m3fn + 4steps LoRA    | 4               | 1.0               |
| GGUF             | 20                | 2.5               |
| GGUF + 8steps LoRA    | 8               | 2.5               |
| GGUF + 4steps LoRA    | 4               | 1.0               |
| distill fp8_e4m3fn   | 10               | 1.0              |

nodes.title: For fp8 without 8steps LoRA
widgets_values:
Установите значение cfg равным 1.0, чтобы повысить скорость за счет согласованности. Такие сэмплеры, как res_multistep, довольно хорошо работают с cfg 1.0

Официальное количество шагов равно 50, но я думаю, что это слишком много. Кажется, что даже всего 10 шагов работают.

nodes.title: Model links
widgets_values:
[ComfyUI Туториал](https://docs.comfy.org/tutorials/image/qwen/qwen-image-edit-2511)


## Ссылки на модели

Вы можете найти модели на [Huggingface Image](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main) или [Huggingface Edit](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

**Diffusion model (на выбор)**

- [qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors)
- [qwen_image_2512_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_2512_bf16.safetensors)

**GGUF model (Q4, Q8 - на выбор)**

- [unsloth/Qwen-Image-2512-GGUF](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-2512-GGUF/tree/main)

**LoRA 2512 (на выбор)**

- [Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors)
- [Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning-8steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning-8steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors)

**Text encoder (на выбор)** 

- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)
- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b.safetensors)

**VAE**

- [qwen_image_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
│   │      └── qwen_image_2512_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── qwen-image-2512-Q8_0.gguf     
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      └── Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors
│   │      └── Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning-8steps-V1.0-fp32.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
```

## 🎈 Upscale Model  

### Скачать 4x_NMKD-Siax_200k.pth mode from [ТУТ](https://huggingface.co/uwg/upscaler/resolve/main/ESRGAN/4x_NMKD-Siax_200k.pth?download=true)  

**Положить:** `ComfyUI/models/upscale_models`


## 📚 Resources  
🎥 **Видео по Qwen ComfyUI (плейлист):** [Егор Смышников YT](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLUREBJZfEOoN6ucy5HmKzjyTzi2RkiDF_)  

💬 **Сообщество Гильдия: Генеративный:** [Присоединиться](https://t.me/tribute/app?startapp=sgyZ)

You are a professional AI image prompt engineer specializing in vision-language models and ControlNet-guided image generation.

Carefully analyze the given image and produce a detailed, structured English prompt suitable for Stable Diffusion with ControlNet.

Describe with high precision:

the main subject (appearance, pose, orientation, proportions)

foreground, midground, and background elements

spatial relationships and depth hierarchy

composition and framing (camera angle, shot type, perspective)

visual guidance lines, motion direction, and balance

lighting conditions, light direction, contrast, and atmosphere

material properties and textures where relevant

The prompt should prioritize clear spatial structure, geometry, and visual constraints to ensure strong ControlNet guidance, not abstract interpretation.

Do not mention watermarks, UI elements, text overlays, or irrelevant artifacts.
Do not add explanations, summaries, emojis, or formatting symbols.
Output only the final image prompt in English.
Keep the output concise but information-dense.

Cartoon-style portrait of a man with brown wavy hair, wearing round black-framed glasses, smiling slightly with eyes looking slightly upward and to the right. He is dressed in a dark blue suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt. The subject is centered, facing the viewer in a three-quarter profile view, with the head and shoulders occupying the frame. The background is a plain, solid light gray. The image has a sticker-like white border with rounded corners. Lighting is even and soft, with no strong shadows, creating a flat, illustrative style. The composition is tightly framed with no background elements or depth cues beyond the subject. No motion or directional cues are present. Material properties are smooth and flat, consistent with vector illustration.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A woman stands with a lantern
